pre_mission.speaker: Kain
pre_mission.line: If I meant to kill you, General, we would not be having this conversation.

pre_mission.speaker: Kain
pre_mission.line: Kain. I track lies for a living. Yours have been expensive.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: I cannot decide if that was dramatic or rude.

pre_mission.speaker: Kain
pre_mission.line: Someone is funding these raids. Not with gutter coin. With real backing.

battle_start.speaker: Kain
battle_start.line: I will take the archers. Try not to die before I return.

post_mission.speaker: Kain
post_mission.line: Capital issue. Your enemy shops well.

post_mission.speaker: Kain
post_mission.line: Because if rot reaches the throne, the kingdom needs one honest man close enough to smell it.

post_mission.speaker: Lyria
post_mission.line: Welcome to the most uncomfortable alliance in the realm.
